evidence: Found "与本变更相关的代码现实" in 目的 section — 相关 (relevant) has no quantitative boundary
description: Vague quantifier '相关' (relevant) used without criteria — 何时使用 table gives some signal but 相关 in prose is unquantified
suggested_fix: Replace with measurable criterion, e.g. '直接调用或被调用的模块'

evidence: Found "运维负担显著不同" in 何时使用 table — 显著 (significantly) has no numeric or categorical threshold
description: Vague quantifier '显著' (significantly) in trigger criteria — no threshold defined for 运维负担差异
suggested_fix: Replace with measurable criterion, e.g. '≥2x deployment steps difference' or '新增外部依赖服务'

evidence: Found "高质量 / 视觉审查" in step 5 — 高质量 (high quality) has no definition; Visual Review checklist referenced but not inline
description: Vague qualifier '高质量' used without inline criteria — Visual Review checklist referenced but not specified
suggested_fix: Replace with or link to specific checklist items inline, e.g. '≤3 label overlaps, all arrows single-direction, contrast ≥4.5:1'

evidence: Opening ```bash at line 58 has no closing ``` before line 62 where step 4 text begins; step 4 and beyond are rendered inside the code block
description: Unclosed Markdown code block in step 3 — steps 4+ are visually absorbed into the bash block in standard Markdown renderers
suggested_fix: Insert closing ``` on a line between the last command (line 60) and '4. **可选：工程补充图**：' (line 62)

evidence: eval "$TAIYI_CLI" "$@" — TAIYI_CLI is set from TAIYI_FORGE_ROOT env var (line 8) and .taiyi/forge-root file (lines 13-17) without sanitization; attacker controlling either can inject arbitrary shell commands
description: eval with variable TAIYI_CLI allows command injection via TAIYI_FORGE_ROOT env var or .taiyi/forge-root file; main execution path in run_taiyi()
suggested_fix: Replace eval with direct invocation: split TAIYI_CLI into array; use "${taiyi_arr[@]}" "$@" pattern instead of eval

evidence: _out=$(eval "$TAIYI_CLI" "$@" 2>"$_err") — same eval-with-variable pattern inside npx fallback branch (lines 49-69)
description: eval with variable TAIYI_CLI inside npx fallback error handler — same command injection vector as line 71
suggested_fix: Same fix as line 71: replace eval with array-based invocation; the $() subshell does not protect against the eval injection

evidence: "postinstall": "node postinstall.mjs" found in scripts section; runs automatically on npm install without user confirmation
description: postinstall script executes build pipeline (npm run build via spawnSync) on every npm install; supply chain risk if package is compromised
suggested_fix: Move postinstall to an explicit install step documented in README; check dist/ exists before running build (TAIYI_FORGE_SKIP_BUILD already exists as escape hatch — document it)

evidence: echo "npx -p oh-my-taiyiforge taiyi" — unpinned package name fetched from npm registry at runtime as CLI fallback
description: npx fallback fetches oh-my-taiyiforge from npm without version pin; subject to package substitution or version hijack
suggested_fix: Pin to specific version: npx -p oh-my-taiyiforge@0.42.0 taiyi, or remove the npx fallback and require explicit install

evidence: spawnSync("npm", ["run", "build"], { cwd: pkgRoot, stdio: "inherit" }) — runs npm build during npm install
description: spawnSync runs npm build during postinstall; build failure is soft-warned but install proceeds; no integrity check on build output
suggested_fix: Add dist/ existence check before building; document TAIYI_FORGE_SKIP_BUILD=1 prominently; consider pre-publishing built dist/ to avoid install-time build

evidence: 9 production deps use ^ ranges: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.29.0, handlebars ^4.7.9, proper-lockfile ^4.1.2, remark ^15.0.1, remark-gfm ^4.0.1, remark-parse ^11.0.0, unified ^11.0.5, zod ^4.4.3, zod-to-json-schema ^3.25.2
description: All production dependencies use ^ ranges allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh npm install without lockfile
suggested_fix: Pin critical deps to exact versions or ensure pnpm-lock.yaml / package-lock.json is committed and CI enforces lockfile fidelity (npm ci)

description: Link to ../../docs/diagrams/pipeline.md — file existence not verified; skill declares this as authoritative source for export path conventions
suggested_fix: Verify docs/diagrams/pipeline.md exists in repo; if missing, add the file or update the reference to the actual location

description: Refers to docs/taiyi/canonical-commands.md and docs/taiyi/commands.yaml as authoritative command sources; file existence not verified
suggested_fix: Verify both files exist; if missing, remove or update references to actual command documentation location

description: Refers to docs/taiyi/token-budget.yaml and docs/taiyi/token-compress-hooks.yaml for configuration; file existence not verified
